metadata.description: Integrated ISP profiles for Iranian internet service providers with advanced DPI behavior, SNI strategies, fragmentation configs, and intelligent anti-censorship bypass techniques
metadata.changelog: v7: fixed duplicate entries, added ITC profile, added shadow_tls_config, reality_configs, utls_fingerprints, doh_servers, dot_servers, cdn_fronting, anti_active_probing, circumvention_tools, reliability_score, last_verified; filled missing fields for asiatech/mobinnet/fanava/irib/pishgaman/afranet; corrected total_profiles count; added advanced_bypass_techniques and quantum_safe section

asn_sharing_notes.5618: Shared by MCI and Mokhaberat/TCI — TCI provides backbone transit for MCI's core network
asn_sharing_notes.42337: Shared by ParsOnline and Pishgaman — Pishgaman uses ParsOnline upstream infrastructure
asn_sharing_notes.56402: Shared by Asiatech and ITC — ITC (DCI) owns Asiatech's infrastructure layer
asn_sharing_notes.12880: Shared by Mokhaberat and ITC — ITC is a subsidiary of TCI/Mokhaberat

metadata.changelog_v8: v8: fixed ASN sharing documentation, completed isp_detection dns_suffixes and ip_ranges for all 13 ISPs, added next_gen_technologies survey, NAIN bypass completeness checklist, Iran DPI intelligence database, enhanced advanced_bypass_techniques

profiles.name_en: MCI (Mobile Communication Company of Iran / Hamrah-e-Aval)

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Best performance on MCI, low DPI visibility
uTLS vision fingerprint evades TLS inspection
QUIC-based, check if QUIC is blocked first
Slow but very reliable domain fronting

fragment_strategy.description: Split TLS ClientHello at SNI extension boundary to prevent DPI fingerprinting of destination domain

anti_active_probing.notes: MCI uses active probing on detected endpoints; rotate server IPs monthly

profiles.notes_fa: بزرگترین اپراتور موبایل ایران. فیلترینگ SNI و DNS فعال است. از FAVA v3 استفاده می‌کند. Reality و AmneziaWG بهترین گزینه‌ها هستند.
profiles.notes_en: Largest mobile operator in Iran. SNI filtering and DNS poisoning are active. Uses FAVA v3. Reality and AmneziaWG are top choices.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Best evasion against FAVA v4 ML classification
uTLS vision most effective against ML DPI
HTTP/2 masquerade, very hard to classify

fragment_strategy.description: Split TLS records at random positions within the record to prevent flow reconstruction. More aggressive than SniSplit to counter ML-based DPI.

reality_configs.note: Rotate server_names regularly due to FAVA v4 ML learning

anti_active_probing.notes: Irancell FAVA v4 does aggressive active probing every 20 min; rotate IPs weekly

profiles.notes_fa: دومین اپراتور موبایل. فیلترینگ شدید همراه با یادگیری ماشین و FAVA v4. Reality با fingerprint تصادفی و ShadowTLS v3 بهترین گزینه‌اند.
profiles.notes_en: Second largest mobile operator. Aggressive DPI with FAVA v4 and ML. Reality with randomized fingerprint and ShadowTLS v3 are top choices.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Easiest to set up, good speed on Rightel
High throughput, QUIC not blocked on Rightel
SniSplit already sufficient but ShadowTLS adds extra safety

fragment_strategy.description: Simple SNI split sufficient for Rightel's FAVA v2 DPI which does not perform reassembly

anti_active_probing.notes: Rightel FAVA v2 does not perform active probing; standard configs work reliably

profiles.notes_fa: سومین اپراتور موبایل. پوشش کمتر اما فیلترینگ نسبتاً سبک‌تر بر پایه FAVA v2. QUIC مسدود نیست.
profiles.notes_en: Third mobile operator. Less coverage but lighter filtering based on FAVA v2. QUIC not blocked.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Best for Shatel fiber; uTLS defeats flow analysis

fragment_strategy.description: Random TLS record splitting to defeat flow-level DPI analysis used on fixed-line connections with higher bandwidth

anti_active_probing.notes: Shatel uses flow analysis at FAVA 3.5; traffic shaping and padding help avoid detection

profiles.notes_fa: یکی از بزرگترین ISPهای ثابت. فیلترینگ شدید جریان روی خطوط ثابت مبتنی بر FAVA 3.5. Reality با fingerprint Firefox توصیه می‌شود.
profiles.notes_en: One of the largest fixed-line ISPs. Heavy SNI and DNS filtering with deep flow analysis. Reality with Firefox fingerprint recommended.

fragment_strategy.description: Standard SNI split effective for Asiatech medium-intensity filtering

anti_active_probing.notes: Asiatech does not perform active probing; medium SNI filtering only

profiles.notes_fa: ISP فیبر نوری با سرعت بالا. فیلترینگ متوسط. QUIC و active probing غیرفعال. یکی از بهترین ISPها برای استفاده از VPN.
profiles.notes_en: Fiber ISP with high speed. Medium filtering. QUIC and active probing disabled. One of the best ISPs for VPN usage.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Best against FAVA v4.1 active probing + ML
HTTP/2 masquerade very hard to detect

fragment_strategy.description: Record-level splitting with padding to counter active probing and statistical analysis. Includes decoy traffic generation.

reality_configs.note: Use long short_id and rotate server_names to defeat FAVA v4.1 learning

anti_active_probing.notes: ParsOnline FAVA v4.1 is most aggressive; rotate IPs weekly and use server-side auth

profiles.notes_fa: ارائه‌دهنده بزرگ با فیلترینگ تجاری گرید سازمانی. فیلترینگ شدید DNS و SNI فعال است. FAVA v4.1 با ML. چرخش IP هفتگی الزامی است.
profiles.notes_en: Large ISP with enterprise-grade filtering. Heavy DNS poisoning, FAVA v4.1 with ML. Weekly IP rotation mandatory.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Best option on Afranet data center network

fragment_strategy.description: Standard SNI split with delay for Afranet moderate filtering

anti_active_probing.notes: Afranet does not perform active probing; moderate SNI filtering only

profiles.notes_fa: ISP دیتاسنتری بزرگ با فیلترینگ لایه‌بندی شده متوسط. مناسب برای دامین فرانتینگ. QUIC مسدود نیست.
profiles.notes_en: Data center ISP with moderate filtering. Good for domain fronting. QUIC not blocked.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Via Alibaba CDN; stable on variable latency

fragment_strategy.description: Standard SNI split for Mobinnet medium filtering

anti_active_probing.notes: Mobinnet does not perform active probing; medium SNI filtering only

profiles.notes_fa: ارائه‌دهنده اینترنت بی‌سیم ثابت (TD-LTE). تاخیر بالاتر اما فیلترینگ منعطف‌تر. QUIC و active probing غیرفعال.
profiles.notes_en: Wireless Fixed LTE internet provider. Higher latency but lighter filtering. QUIC and active probing disabled.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: uTLS vision defeats access gateway DPI

fragment_strategy.description: Record-split for Fanava access gateway DPI

anti_active_probing.notes: Fanava does not use active probing; heavy SNI/DNS filtering at access gateway

profiles.notes_fa: گروه فناوا با فیلترینگ شدید روی گیت‌وی لایه دسترسی و DNS Poisoning فعال. QUIC مسدود است.
profiles.notes_en: Fanava Group with heavy filtering at access gateway. Active DNS poisoning. QUIC blocked.

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: Best on TCI during normal operation
Critical: only option during national intranet mode
Psiphon with Iran config works well on TCI
uTLS vision defeats TCI hub filtering
Effective combined with SNI split and national mode fallback

arvancloud.note: Works even during national intranet mode (ArvanCloud is whitelisted)

fragment_strategy.description: SNI split with national intranet fallback. During intranet-only mode, switches to domestic CDN endpoints and Arvan peers exclusively.

reality_configs.note: During NAIN mode, reality servers must be on domestic or ArvanCloud IPs

anti_active_probing.notes: TCI uses active probing at hub level; rotate IPs bi-weekly

profiles.notes_fa: زیرساخت اصلی و ریشه اینترنت ایران. فیلترینگ در لایه هاب کشوری. قابلیت سوئیچ به شبکه ملی اطلاعات. در حالت NAIN فقط ArvanCloud و سرورهای داخلی کار می‌کنند.
profiles.notes_en: Iran's core internet backbone. Very heavy filtering with national intranet fallbacks. During NAIN mode only ArvanCloud and domestic servers work.

profiles.name_fa: صدا و سیمای جمهوری اسلامی ایران

fragment_strategy.description: Standard SNI split for IRIB enterprise network filtering

anti_active_probing.notes: IRIB enterprise network; heavy SNI filtering identical to TIC but no active probing

profiles.notes_fa: شبکه اختصاصی سازمان صدا و سیما. فیلترینگ شدید پروژه‌های زیرساختی دولتی. مشابه TIC.
profiles.notes_en: Broadcasting enterprise network. Heavy infrastructure filtering identical to TIC. No active probing.

fragment_strategy.description: SNI split with delay for Pishgaman distributed regional filtering

anti_active_probing.notes: Pishgaman uses active probing on detected endpoints

profiles.notes_fa: شبکه ثابت استانی و سراسری پیشگامان با فیلترینگ توزیع‌شده متوسط.
profiles.notes_en: Pishgaman fixed network with standard distributed regional filtering rules.

profiles.name_en: ITC / DCI (Information Technology Company / Data Communication Infrastructure)
profiles.name_fa: شرکت فناوری اطلاعات / زیرساخت داده‌های ارتباطی

preferred_protocols_ranked.notes: uTLS vision bypasses ITC hub DPI

fragment_strategy.description: Record-level split for ITC hub-level DPI

anti_active_probing.notes: ITC hub performs active probing; rotate IPs monthly

profiles.notes_fa: شرکت فناوری اطلاعات ایران — تامین‌کننده زیرساخت ترانزیت دولتی و سازمانی. فیلترینگ در لایه هاب ملی.
profiles.notes_en: Iran's national IT infrastructure and government transit provider. Hub-level DPI filtering.

default_profile.description: Fallback profile used when ISP cannot be identified

advanced_bypass_techniques.description: Global advanced techniques applicable across all Iranian ISPs

record_fragmentation.description: Split TLS ClientHello across multiple TCP segments

ttl_manipulation.description: Send initial packets with low TTL so they expire at DPI middleboxes

utls_impersonation.description: Mimic real browser TLS fingerprints to defeat tls_fingerprinting

ech.description: Encrypted Client Hello hides SNI from DPI; only works on servers with ECH support
ech.note: ECH filtering active on Irancell and ParsOnline as of 2025

shadow_tls_v3.description: Wraps any proxy protocol inside a real TLS handshake with a trusted SNI; v3 adds server-side auth against active probing

reality.description: XTLS Reality: proxies TLS to a real server, server never terminates TLS; DPI sees legitimate TLS session
reality.note: Rotate public keys and short_id monthly

amnezia_wg.description: WireGuard with junk packets, header obfuscation and init packet randomization
amnezia_wg.config_tips: Use Jc=4 Jmin=40 Jmax=70 S1=50 S2=100 H1-H4=random

naiveproxy.description: Uses Chromium network stack to make proxy traffic look like Chrome HTTP/2
naiveproxy.note: Requires a Caddy server with forwardproxy plugin

hysteria2.description: QUIC-based with traffic shaping and MASQ mode; very fast where QUIC is not blocked

use_doh_over_arvancloud.description: ArvanCloud DoH is hosted in Iran, bypasses DNS poisoning and works during NAIN mode

use_dot.description: DNS over TLS on port 853; less likely to be intercepted than UDP 53

dns_over_https_bootstrap.description: Bootstrap DNS resolution for DoH servers using hardcoded IPs

ip_rotation_strategy.description: Rotate VPN server IPs regularly to avoid IP blocklist accumulation

national_intranet_mode_bypass.description: Strategies for when Iran activates full national internet isolation (NAIN)

strategies.name: arvancloud_domestic_fronting
strategies.description: Route traffic through ArvanCloud CDN which is whitelisted during NAIN

strategies.name: yggdrasil_mesh
strategies.description: Yggdrasil overlay network using domestic peers for P2P connectivity

strategies.name: sms_bootstrap
strategies.description: Bootstrap tunnel configuration via SMS when internet is fully cut

strategies.name: ble_mesh
strategies.description: Bluetooth Low Energy mesh for local area connectivity

quantum_safe.description: Post-quantum cryptography support for future-proof censorship resistance

kyber_1024_handshake.description: Kyber-1024 KEM combined with X25519 for hybrid key exchange

lattice_onion.description: Multi-hop onion routing with lattice-based encryption

next_gen_technologies.description: Languages and technologies not present in most VPN projects but highly valuable for next-gen censorship-resistant VPN

rust_io_uring.why: Replaces epoll with Linux io_uring ring buffers shared between userspace and kernel. In SQPOLL mode: zero syscalls for packet I/O. epoll costs 2 syscalls per packet; io_uring costs 0. At 100k pps this eliminates 200k syscalls/sec.
rust_io_uring.iran_advantage: Higher throughput on throttled ISPs; CPU headroom for heavier obfuscation
rust_io_uring.status_in_other_vpns: Virtually none — WireGuard-go, xray, sing-box all use epoll

zig_kernel_components.why: Cross-compiles to MIPS/ARM/x86 for OpenWrt routers without needing the OpenWrt SDK. No libc dependency, no runtime, binary size < 200KB. Safer than C (no undefined behavior), faster startup than Go.
zig_kernel_components.iran_advantage: Runs on low-end Iranian routers (TP-Link, Xiaomi) with 4MB flash

ebpf_kernel_bypass.why: eBPF programs run inside the kernel at tc (traffic control) or XDP hooks. Latency: 2-5µs vs 200-400µs for nfqueue userspace. TLS fragmentation, TTL trick, and DISORDER mode execute in kernel.
ebpf_kernel_bypass.iran_advantage: Defeats FAVA at kernel speed; DPI sees fragmented packets before any userspace can reassemble them
ebpf_kernel_bypass.status_in_other_vpns: GoodbyeDPI/Zapret use nfqueue (userspace). No VPN uses eBPF for this.

wasm_obfuscation.why: Compile obfuscation logic to WASM. The binary signature changes with every recompile. Signature-based DPI cannot learn a stable pattern. Also runs in browser extensions — no app installation needed.
wasm_obfuscation.iran_advantage: Iran DPI relies heavily on static signatures. WASM binary polymorphism breaks this.

libp2p_p2p_discovery.why: P2P server discovery via DHT (distributed hash table). If one server IP is blocked, the client automatically finds another peer without any central authority. Kademlia DHT is used.
libp2p_p2p_discovery.iran_advantage: Iran frequently blocks server IPs. libp2p makes the server infrastructure self-healing.
libp2p_p2p_discovery.status_in_other_vpns: Lantern uses it partially; no major VPN uses it fully

pqc_hybrid_kex.why: Harvest-now-decrypt-later: intercepted traffic today can be decrypted by quantum computers in ~2030. Hybrid X25519+ML-KEM-768 requires breaking BOTH classical and quantum to recover session keys.
pqc_hybrid_kex.iran_advantage: Iranian intelligence records VPN traffic at scale. PQC protects against future decryption.
pqc_hybrid_kex.status_in_other_vpns: No production VPN has deployed PQC as of 2025

swift_ios_network_extension.why: iOS requires a Network Extension (NEPacketTunnelProvider) written in Swift/ObjC. Implementing the full tunnel in Swift with native Network.framework gives better battery life, lower latency, and avoids the Go runtime overhead.
swift_ios_network_extension.iran_advantage: iOS is dominant in Iran. Native Swift extension = better user experience under throttling.
swift_ios_network_extension.status_in_other_vpns: Most use Go library bridged to Swift via CGo — suboptimal

kotlin_multiplatform.why: Share business logic (ISP detection, profile selection, config generation) across Android, iOS, Desktop in one Kotlin codebase. No code duplication. Type-safe.
kotlin_multiplatform.iran_advantage: Faster iteration on ISP profile updates across all platforms simultaneously
kotlin_multiplatform.status_in_other_vpns: Hiddify uses Flutter; most use separate codebases per platform

flutter_ui.why: Single codebase for Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, Linux, Web. Fast hot-reload for UI iteration. Strong Persian (Farsi) RTL support with proper Noto Nastaliq font rendering.
flutter_ui.iran_advantage: Persian UI quality is critical for Iranian users. Flutter's RTL + Noto Naskh/Nastaliq support is best in class.
flutter_ui.status_in_other_vpns: Hiddify uses Flutter — proven in Iran

go_core_proxy.why: Xray-core, V2Ray, sing-box are all written in Go. Excellent concurrency model (goroutines), fast compilation, strong standard library for network programming. Easiest language to contribute to existing Iranian VPN ecosystem.
go_core_proxy.iran_advantage: Entire Iranian VPN tool ecosystem (Hiddify, V2RayNG, NekoBox) uses Go cores
go_core_proxy.status_in_other_vpns: Dominant — Xray, sing-box, V2Ray all Go

nain_bypass_completeness.description: Complete NAIN (National Intranet) bypass strategy — when Iran cuts all international BGP routes

phase_1_detection.logic: if domestic_ok AND NOT international_ok => NAIN mode

phase_2_immediate_fallback.description: Switch to ArvanCloud CDN within 10 seconds of NAIN detection
phase_2_immediate_fallback.why_it_works: ArvanCloud whitelisted by government; CDN backbone handles cross-border transit independently of BGP withdrawal

phase_3_dns_fallback.description: Switch to ArvanCloud DoH for DNS during NAIN
phase_3_dns_fallback.why: System DNS poisoned during NAIN; ArvanCloud DoH is domestic and not poisoned

phase_4_mesh_fallback.description: If ArvanCloud also fails (worst case), activate Yggdrasil mesh
phase_4_mesh_fallback.mechanism: Yggdrasil IPv6 overlay with pre-seeded Iranian domestic peers

phase_5_sms_bootstrap.description: If internet fully dark, receive new config via SMS
phase_5_sms_bootstrap.mechanism: Encrypted config delivered via SMS to pre-registered number

auto_recovery.description: When international internet returns, automatically switch back

iran_dpi_intelligence.description: Current intelligence on Iranian DPI infrastructure (as of 2025)

fava_system.operator: IRGC Passive Defence Organization + TIC (Telecommunication Infrastructure Company)
fava_system.deployment: Deployed at all tier-1 ISP peering points

poison_ips.description: DNS poison IPs injected by Iranian ISPs — discard any DNS response containing these

blocked_ip_ranges.note: These ranges are blocked at TIC backbone level — avoid as VPN server IPs

alibaba_cloud.note: Chinese CDN — partial whitelist for domestic Chinese content

active_probing_behavior.description: How Iranian DPI active-probes suspected VPN servers
process: 1. DPI identifies suspicious flow by ML features
3. Within 20-30 minutes, DPI sends its own TLS ClientHello to server IP
4. If server responds with generic TLS (no SNI match), IP gets blocklisted
5. If server responds with Reality/ShadowTLS (genuine destination TLS), no block
active_probing_behavior.defense: XTLS Reality and ShadowTLS v3 both respond to active probes with genuine destination server TLS, making the server indistinguishable from the legitimate destination
